raw: {"perspective": "Security Auditor", "findings": [{"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/routers/assessment.py", "issue": "RLS policy missing on historical_scores view. Unauthorized users could access sensitive pre-production assessment data.", "recommended_fix": "Add RLS policy enforcing org_id/team_id ownership or research role. Validate access via PostgREST directly."}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "data/assessment/historical_scores.csv", "issue": "File contains raw PII-like data (emails, names) despite 'anonymized' label. Potential GDPR/Art.9 risk.", "recommended_fix": "Strip all direct identifiers. Use synthetic IDs mapped in isolated storage. Re-validate anonymization process."}, {"severity": "low", "file_or_area": "src/assessment/irt_calibration.py", "issue": "Script writes calibration output to world-readable path. Risk of exposing model parameters.", "recommended_fix": "Write to secure, access-controlled location. Apply least-privilege permissions."}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": "Unauthorized data access risk via missing RLS on assessment data views.", "next_files_to_read": ["apps/api/app/supabase/rls/policies/assessment_rls.sql", "docs/SECURITY-STANDARDS"]}

findings.issue: RLS policy missing on historical_scores view. Unauthorized users could access sensitive pre-production assessment data.
findings.recommended_fix: Add RLS policy enforcing org_id/team_id ownership or research role. Validate access via PostgREST directly.

findings.issue: File contains raw PII-like data (emails, names) despite 'anonymized' label. Potential GDPR/Art.9 risk.
findings.recommended_fix: Strip all direct identifiers. Use synthetic IDs mapped in isolated storage. Re-validate anonymization process.

findings.issue: Script writes calibration output to world-readable path. Risk of exposing model parameters.
findings.recommended_fix: Write to secure, access-controlled location. Apply least-privilege permissions.

whistleblower_flag: Unauthorized data access risk via missing RLS on assessment data views.
